propositions: HEAD-drift tolerance is only tested via direct calls to the _drift_is_benign classifier and two source-inspecting structural tests.
The structural tests test_drift_is_benign_helper_exists (hasattr check) and test_apply_batch_uses_drift_is_benign (getsource wiring check) are redundant and should be deleted.
The real _apply_batch continue path is never exercised with an injected drift commit; only the raise path is covered.
New behavioral tests should inject a HEAD change between mutations against a real tickets-branch git fixture.
Behavioral tests must cover benign continues (unrelated commit, same-ticket edit/delete, sequential benign commits) and non-benign aborts (competing pass_record commit, subject-lookup failure).
The manifest mutations_completed count must be correct after a mid-pass abort.
